field_proposals.rationale: Direction of change with geographic variants; merge decline->decrease and parenthetical suffix.
Only one accepted distinct value (S79+) among 60 accepted occurrences; mixed types (date vs alphanumeric) and very thin canonical set.
Only one accepted distinct value (B11) among 58 accepted occurrences; mixed types and thin sample.
Describes comparison context with high variety (date ranges, route names, etc.) and embedded numeric values; not a controlled set.
Route identifiers; relation context linking to route entities.
Natural-language descriptions of time periods; not standardized.
Table column header labels; free text.
Names of source programs/systems; relation context.
Clear tiered categories with snake_case normalization.
Three distinct scenario types; stable enough for enum.
Three clearly defined transport modes.
Standard day categories.
Borough names with a combined Bronx/Manhattan; normalized to snake_case.
Open-ended geographic names, not a controlled vocabulary.
Unit of measurement; obvious synonyms merged (dollars, USD -> usd).
Temporal scenario label; limited set.
Service types with synonym (express bus -> express) and SBS normalized.
Unit of the 'value' field; small, stable set.
Specific month/year labels (November 2024, October 2025); better as free text.
All occurrences rejected; no accepted data to model.
Open-ended subjective descriptor (faster, more_frequent, much_safer).
All occurrences rejected.
Two frequency granularities.
Place names; open set.
Describes the subject of the metric claim; free text.
Only three single-letter values with minimal context; insufficient to model as enum.
Free-text annotation about the value.
Human-readable dates; not a controlled set.
Single value 'all'; not enough to model as enum.
Open-ended demographic categories.
Two provider types; small, stable set.
Before/after busway; normalized to snake_case.
Only one value 'increase' observed; may duplicate 'direction' field.

key_dispositions.rationale: Only 1 occurrence; too sparse to promote.
Pre-normalized version of borough; covered by borough enum.
Sparse but clear unit for change.
Only one value 'USD'; redundant with units or implicit.
Structured date object; promote as field.
Numeric denominator for rate metrics; 2 occurrences.
Name of transit agency; relation context.
Canonical normalized unit object, present in 83% of submissions.
Mixed year value, 73 occurrences; interpret as numeric.
Sparse free-text description of YoY change.

proposal.notes: Proposed enums only for fields with sufficient accepted distinct values and clear normalization mapping. Many contextual fields kept as free_text or relation_context. Several very sparse keys deferred to needs_more_data.
